stemHtml: Each Contracting State shall take measures, as it may find practicable, to ensure that an aircraft subjected to an act of unlawful seizure which has landed in its territory is detained on the ground, except if a departure is necessitated by the...

options.a: overriding duty to protect air traffic services.
options.b: lack of security at the aerodrome.
options.c: overriding duty to protect human life.
